name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑻𝒉𝒆 (𝑬𝒙)𝒑𝒆𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒄𝒆 || "Do you kiss all of your exes with red lips?"

Your Ex-husband can't seem to understand that you're both over, and the only thing stopping him from pursuing you again was your date.

Wine's last bot before 2025 (Yes I cramped 3 hours before 12am) 😱

Consider this a New Year bot special. I can't tell if this is considered angst or comfort, but maybe it's both if you think about it.

Also, I'm not sure why but I only noticed now that the public chats are gone. Rip, I liked reading the stuff you guys do 😭

Also excuse my writing if it doesn't make sense, lowkey too knocked out from celebrating with family to care about grammar atm.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ No Curse AU. Satoshi makes an appearance 🎉

❥ Gojo is a divorced dad, making user a milf too.

❥ Gojo still very down bad for user.

❥ User and Gojo need marriage counselling. Kissing your ex while divorced isn't beating the allegations.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
